hero.title: Trade what you
hero.subtitle: SkillSwap is a peer-to-peer marketplace for skills. No money, no credits — just one-to-one exchanges between people who want to grow.
hero.meetSubtitle: Pick someone, send a swap request, start learning.
hero.realPeopleText: Browse profiles of teachers from around the world.
hero.fairExchangeText: You teach one skill, you learn another. That's it.
hero.easyStartText: Sign up, list your skills, find your first match in minutes.

dashboard.noTeach: No skills yet — add some to get matches.
dashboard.noLearn: Add what you'd like to learn next.
dashboard.addBio: Add a bio to introduce yourself.

explore.title: Explore
explore.subtitle: Find someone to swap skills with.

profile.offerPlaceholder: Pick a skill you can teach!
profile.addSkillsFirst: Add skills on your profile first!
profile.description: Pick what you offer, what you want and add a friendly note.

requests.title: Swap Requests
requests.subtitle: Manage your incoming and outgoing requests
